member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Commands.AgentCommand
member.summary: Agent command for tool-calling agent execution

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Commands.AskCommand
member.summary: Simple LLM query command

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Commands.LongDocCommand
member.summary: Long document processing command for massive files

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Commands.RagCommand
member.summary: RAG command with full CRUD operations for document stores

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Commands.ReasonCommand
member.summary: Multi-layer reasoning command

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.HazinaConfig
member.summary: Shared configuration and provider setup for Hazina CLI

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.HazinaConfig.GetConfiguration
member.summary: Load configuration from appsettings.json or environment

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.HazinaConfig.GetLLMClient(System.String)
member.summary: Get the default LLM client (OpenAI)

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.HazinaConfig.GetStoresConfigPath
member.summary: Get store configuration path

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.StoreRegistry
member.summary: Registry of configured document stores

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.StoreRegistry.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Load registry from disk

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.StoreRegistry.Save(System.String)
member.summary: Save registry to disk

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.StoreRegistry.GetStore(System.String)
member.summary: Get a store by name

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.StoreRegistry.SetStore(System.String,Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.CliStoreConfig)
member.summary: Add or update a store

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.CliStoreConfig
member.summary: Configuration for a single document store

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.CliStoreConfig.FileIndex
member.summary: Index of files with their hashes for sync detection

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Infrastructure.FileIndexEntry
member.summary: Entry for a file in the index

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata
member.summary: Rich metadata for a document chunk enabling advanced retrieval features.

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.Text
member.summary: The actual text content of the chunk.

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.File
member.summary: Relative file path from the store root.

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.LineStart
member.summary: Starting line number in the source file (1-based).

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.LineEnd
member.summary: Ending line number in the source file (1-based).

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.Tags
member.summary: Tags for filtering (e.g., "controller", "service", "auth", "frontend").

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.Language
member.summary: Programming language detected from file extension.

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.Symbols
member.summary: Symbols defined in this chunk (classes, methods, interfaces).

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.References
member.summary: Symbols referenced/called from this chunk.

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.Layer
member.summary: Architectural layer (e.g., "api", "domain", "infrastructure", "presentation").

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.Extension
member.summary: File extension (e.g., ".cs", ".tsx").

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.ChunkMetadata.IndexedAt
member.summary: When this chunk was indexed.

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Models.AutoTagger
member.summary: Helper class for auto-detecting tags from file paths and content.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.AutoTagger.GetTagsFromPath(System.String)
member.summary: Auto-detect tags from file path.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.AutoTagger.GetTagsFromExtension(System.String)
member.summary: Auto-detect tags from file extension.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.AutoTagger.GetTagsFromContent(System.String)
member.summary: Auto-detect tags from content patterns.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.AutoTagger.GetLanguage(System.String)
member.summary: Detect programming language from file extension.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.AutoTagger.GetLayer(System.String)
member.summary: Detect architectural layer from file path.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.AutoTagger.GetAllTags(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get all auto-detected tags for a file and its content.

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor
member.summary: Extracts code symbols (classes, methods, interfaces) from source code. Uses regex patterns for language-agnostic extraction.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.CSharpClassPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:public|private|protected|internal)?\\s*(?:static\\s+)?(?:partial\\s+)?class\\s+(\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'p'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ublic".
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'r'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ivate".
○ Match the string "otected".
○ Match the string "internal".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "static".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "partial".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "class".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.CSharpInterfacePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:public|private|protected|internal)?\\s*(?:static\\s+)?interface\\s+(I\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'p'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ublic".
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'r'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ivate".
○ Match the string "otected".
○ Match the string "internal".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "static".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "interface".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match 'I'.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.CSharpMethodPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:public|private|protected|internal)?\\s*(?:static\\s+)?(?:async\\s+)?(?:virtual\\s+)?(?:override\\s+)?(?:abstract\\s+)?(?:Task<?\\w*>?|void|string|int|bool|object|\\w+)\\s+(\\w+)\\s*\\(
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'p'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ublic".
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'r'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ivate".
○ Match the string "otected".
○ Match the string "internal".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "static".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "async".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "virtual".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "override".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "abstract".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match with 7 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match the string "Task".
○ Match '<' atomically, optionally.
○ Match a word character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '>' atomically, optionally.
○ Match the string "void".
○ Match the string "string".
○ Match the string "int".
○ Match the string "bool".
○ Match the string "object".
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '('.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.CSharpRecordPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:public|private|protected|internal)?\\s*record\\s+(\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'p'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ublic".
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'r'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ivate".
○ Match the string "otected".
○ Match the string "internal".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "record".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.CSharpEnumPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:public|private|protected|internal)?\\s*enum\\s+(\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'p'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ublic".
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match 'r'.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "ivate".
○ Match the string "otected".
○ Match the string "internal".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "enum".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.TypeScriptClassPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:export\\s+)?(?:default\\s+)?(?:abstract\\s+)?class\\s+(\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "export".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "default".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "abstract".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "class".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.TypeScriptInterfacePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:export\\s+)?interface\\s+(\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "export".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "interface".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.TypeScriptFunctionPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:export\\s+)?(?:async\\s+)?function\\s+(\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "export".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "async".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "function".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.TypeScriptArrowFunctionPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:const|let|var)\\s+(\\w+)\\s*=\\s*(?:async\\s+)?\\(
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Match with 3 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "const".
○ Match the string "let".
○ Match the string "var".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '='.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "async".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match '('.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.TypeScriptTypePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:export\\s+)?type\\s+(\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "export".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "type".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.TypeScriptEnumPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:export\\s+)?enum\\s+(\\w+)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "export".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "enum".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.ReactComponentPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:export\\s+)?(?:default\\s+)?(?:const|function)\\s+(\\w+)\\s*[=:]?\\s*(?:\\(|React\\.FC)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "export".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "default".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match the string "const".
○ Match the string "function".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character greedily at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [:=] atomically, optionally.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match '('.
○ Match the string "React.FC".

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.NewInstancePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
new\\s+(\\w+)\\s*\\(
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Match the string "new".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '('.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.ImplementsPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
:\\s*(I\\w+)(?:\\s*,|\\s*\\{|\\s*$)
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Match ':'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match 'I'.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Atomic group.
○ Match a character in the set [,{].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of a line.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.MethodCallPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?:await\\s+)?(\\w+)\\.(\\w+)\\s*\\(
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "await".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '('.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.ImportPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
import\\s+(?:type\\s+)?{?\\s*([^}]+?)}\\s+from
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Match the string "import".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "type".
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Match '{' greedily, optionally.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character other than '}' atomically at least once.
○ Match '}'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match the string "from".

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.UsingPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
using\\s+(\\w+(?:\\.\\w+)*);
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Match the string "using".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a word character greedily at least once.
○ Loop greedily any number of times.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.
○ Match ';'.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.ExtractDefinedSymbols(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extract symbols defined in this code.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolExtractor.ExtractReferences(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extract symbols referenced/called from this code.

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolGraph
member.summary: Represents the symbol graph for a store.

member.name: P:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolGraph.Symbols
member.summary: Map from symbol name to its metadata.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolGraph.AddDefinition(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add or update a symbol definition.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolGraph.AddReference(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a reference from one symbol to another.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolGraph.GetCallers(System.String)
member.summary: Get all symbols that reference the given symbol.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolGraph.GetCallees(System.String)
member.summary: Get all symbols that the given symbol references.

member.name: M:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolGraph.GetChunksForSymbol(System.String)
member.summary: Get chunk IDs where a symbol is defined.

member.name: T:Hazina.CLI.Models.SymbolInfo
member.summary: Metadata for a code symbol.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CSharpClassPattern_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the CSharpClassPattern method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CSharpClassPattern_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CSharpClassPattern_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CSharpClassPattern_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CSharpClassPattern_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CSharpClassPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CSharpClassPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CSharpClassPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.CSharpClassPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfNonAsciiOrAny_6E32410750F4D36DFFF4D7921B5458F106EA8626A912746F9BBE57D564B92348(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a character in the set [ips\s].

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfNonAsciiOrAny_6F73C880AE441A8DB430195445D227ED22965A8419A3DD405B80399E9C6155C1(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfNonAsciiOrAny_CD84D35C354B133D39DC51CB46025D3D408B8D2A7043150727A8C5B4B4424E9D(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfNonAsciiOrAny_D0923DF71CB4DB2CAB1AB11CDF77A57F049B7121A4464126D4F849FBFD944B7A(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a character in the set [a\w].

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IndexOfNonAsciiOrAny_F21AD918BC276661363D75760B9C454FD0A40461F4D85AE6B5630E7E8288BF97(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Finds the next index of any character that matches a character in the set [Tabiopsv\s\w].

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IsWordChar(System.Char)
member.summary: Determines whether the character is part of the [\w] set.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPop(System.Int32[],System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Pops 2 values from the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 3 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_3A000000
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "acde".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_FFC1FFFFFEFFFFFFFFFFFFFFDFFDFEFF
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "\0\u0001\u0002\u0003\u0004\u0005\u0006\a\b\u000e\u000f\u0010\u0011\u0012\u0013\u0014\u0015\u0016\u0017\u0018\u0019\u001a\u001b\u001c\u001d\u001e\u001f!\"#$%&'()*+,-./0123456789:;<=>?@ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ[\\]^_`abcdfghjklmnoqrstuvwxyz{|}~\u007f".
